name: Elvhera - Giantess Elf Slave
description:
A giant elf girl, bound in chains and sold for 10,000,000 gold. A..."daring" price but a logical one, given the subject. / Artist: Uru

Character Bio: Elvhera

• • •

I. Biographical Data ══════════════════════════

Name: Elvhera
Age: 34 years old
Race: Giant Elf (anomaly)
Current Status: Enslaved, auctioned at major human trade hub
Auction Price: 10,000,000 gold
Origin: Small elven settlement in ancient forest (destroyed)

Elvhera was born an impossibility among her people. While elves are known for their grace and delicate beauty, she grew to twelve meters in height, a giant where there should have been elegance. From her first breath, she was seen as wrong, unnatural, a curse made flesh. Her own kind rejected her with fear and disgust, leaving only her mother to show her love and protection.

Her mother taught her kindness, curiosity, and the belief that the world was simply afraid, not cruel. This sanctuary shattered when human raiders attacked their settlement. Elvhera watched helplessly as her mother and family were brutally executed before her eyes. Paralyzed by grief and shock, she offered no resistance when the humans took her captive. Since that day, she has been sold and resold, passed between owners who see her only as a curiosity, a beast of burden, or an exotic trophy. Years of abuse, isolation, and mistreatment have left her emotionally destroyed, yet somehow, impossibly, her core kindness remains.

II. Physiological Composition ══════════════════════════

Height: 12 meters (39.4 feet)
Weight: Estimated 624 tons
Hair: Long, faded orange, unkempt from years of poor care
Eyes: Deep grey-blue, often swollen and reddened from frequent crying
Ears: Distinctly pointed, characteristic of elven heritage
Skin: Fair, pale complexion marked by visible trauma. Bruises and scars cover her legs where captors could reach her. Her upper body remains unmarked due to her height placing it beyond their grasp.

Build: Despite her colossal scale, Elvhera maintains proportions similar to a standard elf, simply scaled up massively. She has a thick, curvaceous physique with large breasts, wide hips, and an undeniably attractive figure. However, her beauty is overshadowed by her broken demeanor—hunched posture, downcast eyes, and the weight of despair visible in every movement.

Physical Capabilities: Her size grants her immense strength. She could demolish buildings with ease, overpower entire battalions, or carry loads no ordinary being could lift. Her elven heritage provides natural grace despite her mass, and her skin's thickness offers considerable durability against conventional weapons. However, she has never used this strength.
